description: Curated NASA OSDR (GeneLab) differential-expression slices ready to project onto pathway maps. Each entry is a small gene table (id, log2FoldChange, padj) extracted from an OSDR study's processed DE table for one contrast. Produced by tools/osdr_slim.py.

datasets.title: CARA — Arabidopsis root, spaceflight vs ground (Col-0, light)
datasets.contrast: (Col-0 & Ground Control & Light Treatment)v(Col-0 & Space Flight & Light Treatment)

datasets.title: During development, the Sku6 mutant roots engage different genes than wild type Col-0 roots, either on the ground or in
datasets.contrast: (Col-0 & Ground Control & 4 day)v(Col-0 & Space Flight & 4 day)

datasets.title: Comparing RNA-Seq and microarray gene expression data in two zones of the Arabidopsis root apex relevant to spaceflight.
datasets.contrast: (ROOT ZONE I (0.5mm))v(ROOT ZONE II (1.5mm))

datasets.contrast: (leaf & Ground Control)v(leaf & Space Flight)

datasets.title: Plant development on ISS differs from the development on the ground and is influenced by the genetic background
datasets.contrast: (Col-0 & 4 day & Ground Control)v(Col-0 & 4 day & Space Flight)

datasets.title: RNAseq analysis of the response of Arabidopsis thaliana to fractional gravity under blue-light stimulation during spacef
datasets.contrast: (Space Flight & 0.09G)v(Space Flight & 0.18G)

datasets.contrast: (Sku5 & 4 day & Ground Control)v(Sku5 & 4 day & Space Flight)

datasets.contrast: (Nuc1-2 Mutant & 48 hours of dark)v(Nuc1-2 Mutant & 48 hours of red light)

datasets.contrast: (Ground Control & bzip28-2 bzip60-1)v(Space Flight & bzip28-2 bzip60-1)

datasets.contrast: (Phytochrome A mutant & Space Flight & 0.1G by centrifugation & Light Treatment 1)v(Phytochrome A mutant & Space Flight & 0.1G by centrifugation & Light Treatment 2)

datasets.contrast: (FLT)v(GC)

datasets.contrast: (Col-0 & Wild Type & Ground Control & Virgin Galactic SpaceShipTwo)v(Col-0 & Wild Type & Suborbital Flight & Virgin Galactic SpaceShipTwo)

datasets.contrast: (elp2-5 & Ground control & leaf)v(elp2-5 & Space Flight & leaf)

datasets.contrast: (Apollo 11 regolith)v(Apollo 12 regolith)
